scripts.test:copilot: rm -rf .tmp/copilot-tests && tsc -p tests/tsconfig.copilot.json && node .tmp/copilot-tests/tests/copilot-core.test.js && node .tmp/copilot-tests/tests/copilot-manual-provider.test.js && node .tmp/copilot-tests/tests/copilot-portfolio-analyzer.test.js && node .tmp/copilot-tests/tests/copilot-reporting.test.js && node .tmp/copilot-tests/tests/copilot-ui-view-model.test.js && node .tmp/copilot-tests/tests/copilot-email.test.js && rm -rf .tmp/copilot-tests
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
